overall.description: First-person horseback riding through a dark countryside at night in a video game (resembling Red Dead Redemption 2). The rider holds a torch, illuminating the path as the horse transitions from dirt trails to open grasslands and back, eventually encountering another torch-bearing character on the path.

agents.ego_description: riding a horse along a dirt path at night, holding a torch that illuminates the immediate surroundings

entered.detail: unpaved dirt path winding through the landscape
low grass and vegetation lining both sides of the trail
dark night sky filled with visible stars
dark silhouette of forest on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The video opens with a first-person view from horseback riding along a dirt trail at night. The torch illuminates the path ahead while stars are visible in the clear night sky above. The horse moves steadily forward along the narrow trail bordered by grass verges.

events.description: horse leaves dirt path and enters tall grass field

agents.ego_description: galloping through tall grass field, torch swaying with the movement

entered.detail: dense tall grass reaching up to the horse's chest

segments.scene_description: The horse transitions from the dirt trail into an open grassland meadow. The terrain changes to tall grass that sways as the horse gallops through it. The night sky remains visible above with the distant tree line still marking the horizon.

agents.ego_description: continuing at a fast pace through the grassland, torch held high and visible on the left side

entered.detail: small rocks and stones scattered in the grass

segments.scene_description: The horse continues galloping through the expansive grassland. The torch illuminates the golden-brown grass around the path. Scattered rocks begin to appear on the ground as the terrain gradually transitions back toward a trail.

events.description: horse exits tall grass and returns to dirt path
approaching a figure holding a torch standing on the path ahead

agents.ego_description: riding along the dirt path and approaching a stationary person holding a torch

notable_agents.action: standing stationary on the path holding a lit torch, facing the approaching rider

entered.detail: packed dirt path with visible wheel ruts
weathered wooden fence posts lining the left side of the path
warm orange glow of a fire visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The horse returns to a dirt path lined with wooden fence posts. As the rider progresses, a figure holding a torch becomes visible standing in the path ahead. The rider approaches and passes the NPC, with a distant campfire glow visible further down the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey on horseback through a dark countryside that transitions from a narrow trail into open meadows before returning to a fenced path. It begins with the rider moving along a dirt trail under a clear, starry sky, with a handheld torch casting a flickering glow on the grass verges. As the horse accelerates, the scene opens up into an expansive grassland meadow where the torch illuminates swaying golden-brown grass and scattered rocks. The terrain then gradually shifts back toward a structured trail lined with wooden fence posts as the horse slows its gallop. Finally, the camera approaches a solitary figure holding a torch in the middle of the path, passing them to reveal the distant glow of a campfire further ahead.
